system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_thongke_nhapxuat_send","body":"CREATE   PROCEDURE TR_THONGKE_NHAPXUAT_SEND(@ngaythang date)
AS
BEGIN
    SELECT A.makho, B.mavt, (B.slnhap + B.soluong_du) AS soluong_nhap
    INTO #PHIEUNHAP
    FROM tr_phieunhap A
        INNER JOIN tr_ctphieunhap B ON A.sopn = B.sopn
    WHERE A.active = 1 AND A.ngayphieu = @ngaythang

    SELECT A.makho, B.mact, B.soluong AS soluong_xuat
    INTO #PHIEUXUAT
    FROM tr_phieuxuat A
        INNER JOIN tr_ctphieuxuat B ON A.sopx = B.phieuxuat
    WHERE A.active = 1 AND CAST(A.ngaytao AS DATE) = @ngaythang

    SELECT ISNULL(A.makho, B.makho) as makho,
        ISNULL(A.mavt, B.mact) as mavt,
        SUM(ISNULL(A.soluong_nhap, 0)) as soluong_nhap,
        SUM(ISNUll(B.soluong_xuat, 0)) as soluong_xuat
    INTO #NHAPXUAT
    FROM #PHIEUNHAP A
        FULL JOIN #PHIEUXUAT B ON A.makho = B.makho AND A.mavt = B.mact
    GROUP BY ISNULL(A.makho, B.makho), ISNULL(A.mavt, B.mact)

    SELECT A.makho, D.[description] as tenkho, A.mavt, C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt, 
        A.soluong_nhap, A.soluong_xuat, B.soluong as soluong_ton 
    FROM #NHAPXUAT A
        INNER JOIN tr_tonkho_sum B ON A.mavt = B.mavt
        INNER JOIN tr_material C ON A.mavt = C.mavt
        INNER JOIN tr_site D ON A.makho = D.[name]
    ORDER BY A.makho, C.mota
    
    DROP TABLE #PHIEUNHAP, #PHIEUXUAT, #NHAPXUAT
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_ctphieunhap","dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_phieunhap","dbo.tr_phieuxuat","dbo.tr_site","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
